glosses.ja: 専門家; スペシャリスト

sentences.target: Je dois voir un spécialiste demain.

translations.fr: Je dois voir un spécialiste demain.
translations.en: I have to see a specialist tomorrow.
translations.es: Tengo que ver a un especialista mañana.
translations.de: Ich muss morgen zu einem Spezialisten gehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我明天得去看专科医生。
translations.yue: 我聽日要去睇專科醫生。
translations.ru: Мне нужно завтра сходить к специалисту.
translations.pt: Tenho que consultar um especialista amanhã.
translations.vi: Tôi phải gặp bác sĩ chuyên khoa vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: يجب أن أزور طبيبًا مختصًا غدًا.
translations.nl: Ik moet morgen naar een specialist gaan.
translations.uk: Мені треба завтра піти до спеціаліста.
translations.hu: Holnap el kell mennem egy szakorvoshoz.
translations.hi: मुझे कल किसी विशेषज्ञ से मिलना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να δω έναν ειδικό αύριο.
translations.nb: Jeg må til en spesialist i morgen.
translations.id: Saya harus menemui seorang spesialis besok.
translations.sv: Jag måste träffa en specialist i morgon.
translations.ro: Trebuie să văd un specialist mâine.
translations.da: Jeg skal til en specialist i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日、専門医に診てもらう必要がある。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb "dois".
Finite verb (present, 1sg) expressing obligation; governs the infinitive "voir".
Infinitive verb complement of "devoir"; takes "un spécialiste" as its direct object.
Indefinite determiner, masculine singular; introduces the noun "spécialiste".
Common noun (here masculine, indicated by "un"); direct object of "voir".
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the time of the action.

sentences.target: On cherche un spécialiste près d'ici.

translations.fr: On cherche un spécialiste près d'ici.
translations.en: We’re looking for a specialist near here.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un especialista cerca de aquí.
translations.de: Wir suchen einen Spezialisten in der Nähe.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando uno specialista qui vicino.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在附近找专科医生。
translations.yue: 我哋喺附近搵專科醫生。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um especialista aqui perto.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một bác sĩ chuyên khoa gần đây.
translations.ar: نبحث عن طبيب مختص بالقرب من هنا.
translations.nl: We zoeken een specialist in de buurt.
translations.hi: हम यहाँ के आसपास किसी विशेषज्ञ की तलाश कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en spesialist i nærheten.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari seorang spesialis di dekat sini.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en specialist i närheten.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en specialist i nærheden.
translations.ja: この近くで専門医を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal personal pronoun used as subject; often translates as "one" or colloquial "we".
Finite verb (present, 3sg); main predicate meaning "to look for/search".
Indefinite determiner, masculine singular; introduces "spécialiste".
Common noun; direct object of "cherche".
Adverb functioning as part of the multiword preposition "près de"; expresses proximity.
Elided preposition "de" before a vowel; introduces the complement "ici" in the "près de" construction.
Adverb of place; complement of the prepositional phrase "près de" indicating location.

sentences.target: Elle travaille comme spécialiste en pédiatrie.

translations.fr: Elle travaille comme spécialiste en pédiatrie.
translations.en: She works as a pediatric specialist.
translations.es: Ella trabaja como especialista en pediatría.
translations.de: Sie arbeitet als Fachärztin für Pädiatrie.
translations.pt: Ela trabalha como especialista em pediatria.
translations.vi: Cô ấy là bác sĩ chuyên khoa nhi.
translations.ar: هي تعمل كأخصائية في طب الأطفال.
translations.nl: Ze werkt als specialist in de kindergeneeskunde.
translations.hi: वह बाल चिकित्सा विशेषज्ञ के रूप में काम करती है.
translations.nb: Hun jobber som spesialist i pediatri.
translations.sv: Hon arbetar som specialist i pediatrik.
translations.ro: Ea lucrează ca specialist în pediatrie.
translations.da: Hun arbejder som specialist i pædiatri.
translations.ja: 彼女は小児科の専門医として働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person feminine singular; subject of "travaille".
Finite verb (present, 3sg); main predicate meaning "to work".
Preposition meaning "as"; introduces a predicative nominal indicating role.
Common noun functioning as a predicative complement (occupation) governed by "comme".
Preposition introducing the field/domain of specialization.
Common noun; object of the preposition "en" specifying the medical field.

sentences.target: Nous attendons le spécialiste de la chaudière.
sentences.reading: /nu atɑ̃dɔ̃ lə spesjalist də la ʃodjɛʁ/

translations.fr: Nous attendons le spécialiste de la chaudière.
translations.ipa: /nu atɑ̃dɔ̃ lə spesjalist də la ʃodjɛʁ/
translations.en: We are waiting for the boiler specialist.
translations.es: Estamos esperando al especialista de la caldera.
translations.it: Stiamo aspettando lo specialista della caldaia.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando o especialista da caldeira.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đợi chuyên gia về nồi hơi.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо на спеціаліста з котла.
translations.hi: हम बॉयलर विशेषज्ञ का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちはボイラーの専門家を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of "attendons".
Finite verb (present, 1pl); main predicate meaning "to wait (for)"; takes "le spécialiste" as direct object.
Definite determiner, masculine singular; introduces the noun "spécialiste".
Common noun; direct object of "attendons".
Preposition introducing a nominal complement that modifies "spécialiste".
Definite determiner, feminine singular; introduces "chaudière".
Common noun; object of the preposition "de" specifying the referent.
